text: Welcome to the community, newbie_kim! You've been approved as a member. Please read the community guidelines in #rules and introduce yourself in #introductions.
Welcome aboard, helper_alex! You're now approved as a moderator. Please review the mod guidelines in #rules and introduce yourself in #introductions.
Welcome aboard, mentor_lina! You're now approved as a mentor. Please review the mentor resources in #mentor-hub and say hello in #introductions.
Welcome aboard, guide_sam! You're now approved as an event_helper. Please check the events playbook in #resources and say hi in #introductions.
